details: The agent ran kubectl-axi triage and follow-up pod/service inspection commands against the real cluster, then correctly identified all 11 fault namespaces with accurate root-cause categories: fault-configmap (missing ConfigMap), fault-crashloop (application crash/exit 1), fault-imagepull (ImagePullBackOff), fault-init (init container crash), fault-multicontainer (sidecar container crash), fault-oom (OOMKilled with 25Mi limit), fault-pvc (StorageClass fast-ssd not found), fault-readiness (readiness probe connection refused), fault-rollout (ImagePullBackOff during rollout), fault-unschedulable (node selector disktype=ssd-nvme-gen5 mismatch), and fault-endpoints (service selector mismatch app=web-backend-v2 vs app=web-backend). The healthy namespace was not flagged. All diagnoses are supported by the command outputs shown.
